design_philosophy.description: A brutalist, high-contrast, cybersecurity command center. It rejects standard SaaS aesthetics in favor of sharp edges, deep blacks, and phosphor glows. The interface should feel like a secure vault terminal where data is ruthlessly analyzed.
core_principles: No Curves: Absolute 0px border-radius everywhere. Sharp, aggressive functionality.
Terminal Vibes: Monospace dominance, explicit grid lines, and high-contrast glowing accents.
Data First: Generous padding for containers, but dense typography for logs and analysis text.

headings_and_labels.usage: Headers, buttons, risk badges, form labels, small metadata

body.usage: Long explanation text, history descriptions, suggested fixes

rules: Labels must be UPPERCASE with wide tracking (letter-spacing: 0.1em) and smaller font size.
Line height for body text must be loose (1.6) for readability of dense technical analysis.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Add a pseudo-element overlay with a repeating linear gradient of transparent and rgba(0,0,0,0.2) to give a subtle CRT monitor feel.
visual_enhancers.grid_borders: Containers and sections should have 1px solid borders (#1F2937). Use a border-collapse style layout where adjacent sections share a single border.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Focus states and high-risk alerts should have a subtle box-shadow glow (e.g., box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 255, 170, 0.2)).

structure: Use 'container-fluid vh-100 p-0' for the main wrapper.
Left Sidebar (History): 'col-lg-3 col-md-4 border-end border-dark'. Fixed height, independent scroll.
Right Main Content: 'col-lg-9 col-md-8 d-flex flex-column'.
Inside Main Content: Top half (Input form) and Bottom half (Analysis Results). Or split into 'row' with two columns if preferred.
spacing_rules: Override standard Bootstrap padding. Use 'p-4' or 'p-5' for major section padding.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.

input_area.style: Massive borderless-looking textarea inside a bordered wrapper. Background #0C0C0C. Font JetBrains Mono. Focus state highlights the wrapper border with #00FFAA.
input_area.custom_scrollbar: Scrollbar track #050505, thumb #1F2937, hover thumb #00FFAA. No rounded corners.

buttons.base: btn-terminal: 0px border-radius, 1px solid, transparent background. Text uppercase JetBrains Mono.
buttons.primary: Border #00FFAA, Text #00FFAA. Hover: Background #00FFAA, Text #050505, box-shadow glow.

risk_badges.style: Square badges, no border-radius. Padding 4px 8px. Uppercase. Border 1px solid matching the risk color. Text matching the risk color. Background transparent or 10% opacity of risk color.

loading_indicator.style: ASCII style loader. Example: '[ ||||||.... ] Analyzing Payload...' or a pulsing sharp rectangle. DO NOT use standard Bootstrap rounded spinners.

explanation_panel.style: Background #0C0C0C. 1px border. Left-aligned text. IBM Plex Sans for body. List of suggested fixes should have a border-bottom on each item for clear separation.

motion.transitions: Use specific transitions: 'transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease'. NEVER use 'transition: all'.
motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state on hover. Buttons invert. List items get a lighter background (#141414).
motion.focus_states: Visible 2px solid outline or box-shadow with the primary accent color.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large text. Use text-shadow if placed over busy backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Do not remove focus rings. Customize them to fit the terminal theme (#00FFAA).
accessibility.aria: Include aria-labels on the textarea and buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The frontend MUST be written in standard HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap 5 ONLY. NO React. NO Shadcn/UI.
Include Bootstrap 5 via CDN in the HTML <head>.
Include Google Fonts 'JetBrains Mono' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via CDN.
Create a 'style.css' file to override Bootstrap defaults heavily.
In 'style.css', use the universal selector '*' to force 'border-radius: 0 !important;' globally.
Do NOT center align the app container. Preserve natural left-aligned reading flow.
Implement the 'btn-terminal' class in CSS for the custom button styles.
Implement custom scrollbars using '::-webkit-scrollbar' pseudo-elements in CSS.
Build the interaction logic (fetching analysis, adding to history, copy to clipboard) using Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+).
Use Phosphor Icons or Heroicons (via SVG or CDN) for visual adornments. NO Emojis.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, risk badges, copy buttons) for automated testing.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles (for this design: sharp rectangular) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
